title: Sven's Wiki
description: Adds an entire in-game wiki to Minecraft. No more searching 10 different websites, just open the wiki menu and search! Also includes additional features.
body:
# Sven's Wiki

Tired of constantly alt-tabbing to your browser or digging through countless websites just to find basic information?  
Sven's Wiki brings a fully integrated wiki experience directly into Minecraft, so everything you need is available exactly where you need it.

No interruptions. No ads. Just information, in-game.


## Project Status

**This project is currently in alpha.**  
Some features are in place, but many features are still under development and may change over time.



## Current Features

- Data-Driven Wiki Interface  
  A flexible and scalable system that dynamically pulls and displays in-game data.

- In-Game Search System  
  Quickly find items, entities, and more without leaving your world.

- Integrated Detail View  
  View detailed information about selected entries directly within the UI.



## Planned Features

- Advanced UI Components  
  Cleaner layouts, better spacing, and more polished visual elements.

- Handcrafted Vanilla Wiki Pages  
  Custom-written, high-quality pages for all vanilla items and entities.

- Task & To-Do Overlay  
  Track goals and tasks without leaving the game.

- Item Collection Overlay  
  Build and manage gathering lists for crafting or progression.

- Mod Integration API  
  Allow other mods to easily add their own custom wiki pages.
